title: Perform gas metal arc welding
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform gas metal arc welding demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare

pcs.text: Weld specifications are identified and confirmed from job sheets, welding standards and work instructions1.2 Welding safety equipment and welder are identified, obtained and inspected for faults and correct operation1.3 Resources and work areas are prepared and potential hazards identified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Weld specifications are identified and confirmed from job sheets, welding standards and work instructions1.2 Welding safety equipment and welder are identified, obtained and inspected for faults and correct operation1.3 Resources and work areas are prepared and potential hazards identified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Weld specifications are identified and confirmed from job sheets, welding standards and work instructions1.2 Welding safety equipment and welder are identified, obtained and inspected for faults and correct operation1.3 Resources and work areas are prepared and potential hazards identified.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan and prepare

elements.title: Weld materials

pcs.text: Workplace procedures are identified and followed2.2 GMAW equipment is prepared, adjusted and used according to manufacturer operating procedures2.3 Weld test runs are conducted according to work plan, weld specifications and quality requirements2.4 Materials are welded using GMAW process to specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Workplace procedures are identified and followed2.2 GMAW equipment is prepared, adjusted and used according to manufacturer operating procedures2.3 Weld test runs are conducted according to work plan, weld specifications and quality requirements2.4 Materials are welded using GMAW process to specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Workplace procedures are identified and followed2.2 GMAW equipment is prepared, adjusted and used according to manufacturer operating procedures2.3 Weld test runs are conducted according to work plan, weld specifications and quality requirements2.4 Materials are welded using GMAW process to specifications.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Weld materials

elements.title: Check welds

pcs.text: Welds are cleaned using appropriate techniques according to work instruction3.2 Weld quality and specifications are checked and confirmed by non-destructive testing3.3 Weld defects are identified and prepared for re-welding, and appropriate personnel are notified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Welds are cleaned using appropriate techniques according to work instruction3.2 Weld quality and specifications are checked and confirmed by non-destructive testing3.3 Weld defects are identified and prepared for re-welding, and appropriate personnel are notified?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Check welds

elements.title: Complete job

pcs.text: Work areas are cleaned and cleared of waste materials according to workplace procedures4.2 GMAW equipment is cleaned, maintained, inspected and stored according to workplace procedures4.3 Faulty welding equipment is identified, tagged and reported4.4 Work sheets are completed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Work areas are cleaned and cleared of waste materials according to workplace procedures4.2 GMAW equipment is cleaned, maintained, inspected and stored according to workplace procedures4.3 Faulty welding equipment is identified, tagged and reported4.4 Work sheets are completed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Work areas are cleaned and cleared of waste materials according to workplace procedures4.2 GMAW equipment is cleaned, maintained, inspected and stored according to workplace procedures4.3 Faulty welding equipment is identified, tagged and reported4.4 Work sheets are completed according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete job
